description: Create a dynamic Mohr's Circle applet for stress analysis. The applet must include three sliders: 'sig_x' (range -100 to 100), 'sig_y' (range -100 to 100), and 'tau' (range 0 to 100). Construct the stress state using Point A (sig_x, -tau) and Point B (sig_y, tau), with a circle defined by diameter AB. Identify the Principal Stresses as the intersection points of the circle with the x-axis. Set the sliders to the calibration values sig_x = 80, sig_y = -40, and tau = 25, then save the project as 'mohrs_circle.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
